headline: Does ICE’s AI and Digital-Asset Push Reshape The Bull Case For Intercontinental Exchange (ICE)?
summary: In recent days, Intercontinental Exchange, Inc. has rolled out AI-driven mortgage servicing agents, unveiled its ICE Private Credit Intelligence platform with Apollo as anchor partner, advanced new Encompass integrations via Docutech, expanded into container freight futures, and announced a minority investment and collaboration with blockchain firm OKX. Together, these moves highlight how ICE is pushing deeper into AI automation, private credit data infrastructure, and digital-asset market...

headline: Major League Baseball Inks First-Of-Its-Kind Polymarket Deal, Signs CFTC Integrity Pact
summary: MLB and Polymarket signed a multi-year deal worth up to $300 million. The league also partnered with the CFTC to protect prediction markets.
